rabbits_foot.name: rabbits_foot
rabbits_foot.description: A small rabbit's foot. You feel a bit luckier. +1 to attack rolls.

ring_of_protection.name: Ring of Protection
ring_of_protection.description: A simple gold band that hums with protective energy. +1 to AC & Spell Resist.

cloak_of_protection.name: Cloak of Protection
cloak_of_protection.description: A heavy velvet cloak that seems to turn away blades. +2 to AC & Spell Resist.

bracers_of_defense.name: Bracers of Defense
bracers_of_defense.description: Magical bracers that create a shimmering field of force. +2 to AC, Spell Resist, and Damage Resist.

ring_of_health.name: Ring of Health
ring_of_health.description: A pulsating red gem that invigorates the wearer. +25 Max HP.

amulet_of_health.name: Amulet of Health
amulet_of_health.description: A radiant artifact that vastly increases vitality. +50 Max HP.

mana_crystal.name: Mana Crystal
mana_crystal.description: A shard of magical energy. +1 to Spell DC, spell attacks, and +2 MP.

spell_book.name: Spell Book
spell_book.description: A tome infused with magical energy. +2 to Spell DC, spell attacks, and +4 MP.

archmage_crystal.name: Archmage Crystal
archmage_crystal.description: A dense cluster of mana crystals. +3 to Spell DC, spell attacks, and +6 MP.

Amulet_of_the_warmage.name: Amulet of the Warmage
Amulet_of_the_warmage.description: An amulet favored by battle-mages. +4 Spell DC, resistance, and attack rolls, +5 to damage and +10 Max MP.

soldiers_mark.name: Soldier's Mark
soldiers_mark.description: A token given to distinguished soldiers. +1 to hit and damage, +2 Max Stamina and +5 Max HP.

minotaurs_horn.name: Minotaur's horn
minotaurs_horn.description: A horn from a mighty minotaur. +2 to hit and damage, +4 Max Stamina and +20 Max HP.

dragons_claw.name: Dragon's Claw
dragons_claw.description: A claw from an ancient dragon. +3 to hit and damage, +6 Max Stamina and +50 Max HP.

titan_heart.name: Titan Heart
titan_heart.description: A heart of pure titan essence. +4 to hit and damage, +10 Max Stamina and +100 Max HP.

ancient_amber.name: Ancient Amber
ancient_amber.description: A rare piece of amber containing a prehistoric insect. +30 Max HP, +3 Spell Resist.

captain_badge.name: Captain's Badge
captain_badge.description: A badge of office for a military captain. +2 to hit, +2 Max Stamina.

champions_belt.name: Champion's Belt
champions_belt.description: A heavy belt awarded to great gladiators. +40 Max HP, +4 damage.

crown_of_skulls.name: Crown of Skulls
crown_of_skulls.description: A grizzly crown of bone that hums with necrotic power. +3 Spell DC, +5 Max MP.

draconic_idol.name: Draconic Idol
draconic_idol.description: A small idol carved from dragon bone. +1 Spell DC, +3 Max MP.

evil_eye_gem.name: Evil Eye Gem
evil_eye_gem.description: A gem that looks like a baleful eye. +2 Spell DC, +2 Spell Resist.

feather_of_speed.name: Feather of Speed
feather_of_speed.description: A feather that feels weightless. +2 to attack rolls.

hags_eye.name: Hag's Eye
hags_eye.description: A preserved eye from a green hag. +2 Spell DC, +4 Max MP.

hydra_tooth.name: Hydra Tooth
hydra_tooth.description: A sharp tooth that seems to slowly regrow. +25 Max HP, +2 to hit.

lightning_gland.name: Lightning Gland
lightning_gland.description: A pulsing organ harvested from a behir. +5 to damage.

oni_mask.name: Oni Mask
oni_mask.description: A fearsome mask that grants its wearer supernatural focus. +2 AC, +1 Spell DC.

orb_of_dragonkind.name: Orb of Dragonkind
orb_of_dragonkind.description: An artifact of immense draconic power. +5 Spell DC, +10 Max MP.

phylactery.name: Phylactery
phylactery.description: A container for a powerful mage's soul. +4 Spell DC, +8 Max MP.

swamp_core.name: Swamp Core
swamp_core.description: A dense knot of plant matter and mud. +40 Max HP.

tarrasque_heart.name: Tarrasque Heart
tarrasque_heart.description: The still-beating heart of the tarrasque. +200 Max HP, +5 AC.

unholy_symbol.name: Unholy Symbol
unholy_symbol.description: A symbol of a dark deity. +2 Spell DC, +2 Max MP.

void_core.name: Void Core
void_core.description: A core of pure nothingness. +5 Damage Resist, +5 Spell Resist.

warlords_banner.name: Warlord's Banner
warlords_banner.description: A standard that inspires relentless aggression. +5 to hit and damage.

world_tree_leaf.name: World Tree Leaf
world_tree_leaf.description: A leaf from the Yggdrasti. +50 Max HP, +5 Max MP.
